name: vc_danger_halluc
prompt: Minimalist digital illustration on a pure dark background (#1A1A2E). Flat vector style with soft gradients. Limited color palette: electric blue (#7AB8F5), teal (#2EC4B6), amber (#F39C12), white (#FFFFFF). Clean geometric shapes, no text, no watermarks, no photorealism. Ample negative space. Professional and modern aesthetic, suitable for tech conference projection. A package box icon in electric blue with a ghost-like phantom duplicate next to it in faint teal, both feeding into a supply chain arrow. The phantom package has an amber warning glow. Represents LLMs generating references to non-existent packages that create supply-chain attack vectors. No text, no letters, no words, no labels, no watermarks. 2:3 portrait aspect ratio. Dark background #1A1A2E.
